products.name: Dragon Ball Mug DBZ Goku & Vegeta 460ml
products.description:
Dragon Ball DBZ Goku & Vegeta Mug, capacity of 460ml. Official product by Abystyle.

Goku and Vegeta: the rivalry that forges legends. Two warriors, two opposing paths, but a single goal: to reach unimaginable heights. One embodies the purity of determination, the other the pride of a warrior prince. Together, let's push back the limits of what's possible with this large Dragon Ball Z mug by ABYstyle!

  • High-quality ceramic mug. Standard capacity (460 ml)
  • Packaging: cardboard box to protect the mug while ensuring 360° visibility
  • Microwave and dishwasher safe.

products.description:
Dragon Ball Goku & Oozaru Mug, capacity of 320ml. Official product by Abystyle.

The raw power of a legendary transformation. One warrior, one monster, but one devastating force. Push your limits with this Dragon Ball mug by ABYstyle!

  • Standard size (320ml)
  • Packaging: black window-box.
  • Dishwasher and micro-wave safe.

products.name: One Piece Card Game Tin Box ST-01 - OP10 Royal Blood *Modèle aléatoire * *French*
products.description: One Piece Card Game Tin Box ST-01 - OP10 Royal Blood *Modèle aléatoire * in French. Official product by Bandai.

products.name: Naruto Shippuden Jiraiya One Last Heartbeat HQS 1/8 Statue Tsume Art 60 cm (New)
products.description:
Naruto Shippuden Statue of Jiraiya One Last Heartbeat, 1/8 scale size approx.60cm. Official product in limited edition of 2750 pieces by Tsume.

« The Great lord Elder prophesied that I would be the one to guide the revolution. A person who would make a great choice that will bring either peace or destruction to the world of the shinobi. »

An epic moment that we decided to immortalize through the realization of a 1/8 HQS statue by Tsume, paying tribute to the heroic legendary ninja! Very dynamic, the statue emphasises the intense emotion felt in the heart of the action, like a freeze frame: that of one ultimate heartbeat, a last will that will change the course of the future ...

The scene takes place in Nagatos original village : Ame, the Village Hidden in the Rain. Indeed, behind the rock plate where Jiraiya is agonizing, we find imposing line pipe and grids, covered with a metallic paint mixing copper, brown, black and gray shades for a realistic rendering. Under the effect of the 5 ninjas powerful attack, the water in bluish transparent resin is unleashing, creating scum. The legendary ninja begins what he thinks to be his ultimate fight: the time of his great choice has come! Determined to unmask Pain, he recognizes Yahiko, one of his former students having lost his live. As Tendô, he wears Pains violet ring on his thumb and takes the role of leader, being above the 4 other ninjas.

These former shinobis were all once defeated by Jiraiya. They wear the long black robe with the Akatsuki symbol, painted with black, gray and dark red shades, then covered with a matte varnish to be faithful to the license. Their hair is painted in a gradient of light and darker orange while their barred headband indicates that they have deserted the Village Hidden in the Rain. Their pupils are formed of gray and purple concentric circles ... The dōjutsu Rinnegan ... Nagato! The dozens of metal piercings implanted in the corpses of the ninjas, serve as emitters and receivers of chakra, allowing Nagato to remotely control them ... While Jiraiya finally gets his answer, 5 spears pierce his back, staining his long white hair with blood. Lying in a pool of his own blood, in reddish and varnished transparent resin, the condemned ninja remembers Narutos unwavering determination ... A memory allowing his heart to beat one last time to finally carry out his mission. Grimacing with his bloody mouth, showing a glassy but determined look, he uses the chakra in bluish transparent resin emanating from his fingertip, to engrave a coded message on Fukasakus back. Here, we notice his arm pierced by the spear of the 6th Pain he killed. The toad, just like Jiraiya, shows an expression of both pain and obstinacy: it became the key to stop Pain, ready to deliver this crucial message ... While Jiraiya is slowly dying, the 5 Pain pounce on him to put a definitive end to his life, their robe thrown back due to the speed of movement.

His duty accomplished, the legendary ninja lets himself be serenely dragged to the abyssal depths. Jiraiyas last thoughts are about his next novel, which he decides to call "The Story of Naruto Uzumaki", because he is absolutely sure now : here is the Child of the Prophecy!

The statue comes with a numbered plate and a certificate of authenticity.

Total run of 2,750 pieces.

Dimensions: L: 59.5 cm; W: 55.7 cm; D: 49.6 cm

products.name: Naruto Statue 1/4 Orochimaru BIJUtsu by Tsume 53cm
products.description:
Naruto Statue of Orochimaru in BIJUtsu collection, 1/4 scale size approx.53cm. Official product in limited edition of 800 pieces by Tsume Art.

Part of Sasuke’s destiny, Orochimaru is depicted here during his battle against Sarutobi on the rooftops of Konoha, sword in hand. An essential piece for dedicated collectors! Orochimaru’s face is enhanced with the use of transparent resin for his eyes, a technique that brings a fascinating depth to his piercing gaze. His menacing and calculating expression is captured with great precision, making this Orochimaru statue particularly lifelike and striking. The serpent adds to the threatening atmosphere of the statue. This Naruto statue highlights Orochimaru’s reptilian connection with a serpent sculpted in meticulous detail, mouth open, its dynamic pose reinforcing the dangerous nature of the character.

The base represents the rooftops of Konoha during Orochimaru’s battle with Sarutobi. Every detail has been carefully crafted to elevate the entire piece. The edge of the base symbolizes Sasuke's destiny, as seen in all statues of the Crossed Destinies Collection. A symbol of Orochimaru's cursed mark can also be placed on the base.

Eyes in Resin

The eyes of various characters from the BIJUtsu® range are made from transparent resin, giving an exceptional depth to their gaze.

Paint Style

In our Crossed Destinies, we’ve added a subtle “cell-shading” effect, visible from a specific angle of the statue. This allows to provide depth and a certain dynamism to the statue.

Base

Depending on the destiny of Naruto or Sasuke, the base varies, telling the story of each protagonist.

Display Set

The BIJUtsu® Display Set transforms your box into an elegant display stand. The ‘Cover’ enhances your statue, and the ‘Scroll’ decorates the background, adding charm to your space.

products.name: Naruto Statue 1/6 Tsunade Ikigai by Tsume 46cm
products.description:
Naruto statue of Tsunade in Ikigai collection, 1/6 scale size approx.46cm. Official product in limited edition of 599 pieces by Tsume Art.

-LEGENDARY SANNIN-

Tsunade, one of the three legendary Sannin of Konoha, represents the strength and wisdom of this iconic trio alongside Jiraiya and Orochimaru. As an expert in medical techniques and possessing immense physical power, she is a symbol of invincibility, both as a protector and a fierce warrior. This statue captures her aura and determination in a powerful attack pose.

-KATSUYU-

By her side stands Katsuyu, the giant slug Tsunade summons during battles. Katsuyu is not only a defensive ally but also crucial in healing comrades and dealing damage to enemies. The duo is depicted here at their full strength, ready to fight and protect, a perfect combination of force and strategy.

-MARKS OF REGENERATION-

Tsunade’s statue highlights the distinctive marks on her forehead, a symbol of her mastery over the Strength of a Hundred Seal. This ultimate technique allows her to heal instantly and serves as a reminder of her pivotal role as a medical ninja. The detailed sculpt showcases these marks, emphasizing the immense power within her, ready to be unleashed.

18 X 36 X 46 CM

products.name: Naruto Statue 1/6 Jiraiya Ikigai by Tsume 43cm
products.description:
Naruto statue of Jiraiya in Ikigai collection, 1/6 scale size approx.43cm. Official product in limited edition of 899 pieces by Tsume Art.

-LEGENDARY SANNIN-

One of the most respected and powerful ninjas of Konoha, Jiraiya is part of the legendary Sannin, a mythical trio formed alongside Orochimaru and Tsunade. Depicted here in a dynamic stance, Jiraiya embodies the perfect balance between raw strength and wisdom.

-SAGE MODE-

In this scene, Jiraiya is shown fully mastering Sage Mode, a rare and powerful technique learned at Mount Myōboku alongside the wise toads, Fukasaku and Shima, who are featured by his side. This transformation allows him to amplify his strength, speed, and sensory abilities. A perfect embodiment of the harmony between man and nature, this statue highlights the serenity and immense power he draws from this mode.

-SENPO GOEMON-

This Ikigai depicts Jiraiya in his battle against Pain. Jiraiya spits oil, Fukasaku generates wind, and Shima breathes fire, creating a true wave of burning, destructive oil. The toads are intricately sculpted, adding dynamism and realism to the scene, while the oil gushes around him, bringing the action to life. This statue captures all the intensity and grandeur of the fight, paying homage to this unparalleled ninja.

22 X 37 X 43 CM

products.name: Naruto Statue 1/4 Kakashi Hatake BIJUtsu by Tsume 51cm
products.description:
Naruto Statue of Kakashi Hatake in BIJUtsu collection, 1/4 scale size approx.51cm. Official product in limited edition of 2000 pieces by Tsume Art.

Key character in the crossed destinies of Naruto and Sasuke. The Copy Ninja is depictedhere as he appeared during their first encounter, the bell test.

Eyes in Resin

The eyes of various characters from the BIJUtsu® range are made from transparent resin, giving an exceptional depth to their gaze.

Paint Style

In our Crossed Destinies, we’ve added a subtle “cell-shading” effect, visible from a specific angle of the statue. This allows to provide depth and a certain dynamism to the statue.

Base

Depending on the destiny of Naruto or Sasuke, the base varies, telling the story of each protagonist.

Display Set

The BIJUtsu® Display Set transforms your box into an elegant display stand. The ‘Cover’ enhances your statue, and the ‘Scroll’ decorates the background, adding charm to your space.

W : 29 CM x D : 29 CM x H : 51 CM

products.name: Naruto Vinyl Soundtrack Best Collection Edition Standard 1x
products.description:
Naruto Vinyl Soundtrack. Official product by Microids Records.

In the village of Konoha lives Naruto, a young boy who is hated and feared by the villagers because he holds within himself Kyuubi (nine-tailed fox demon) of incredible strength, which killed a large number of people. Konoha's most powerful ninja at the time, the Fourth Hokage, Minato Namikaze, manages to seal this demon in Naruto's body.

Unfortunately he lost his life there.

This is how twelve years later, Naruto dreams of becoming Konoha's greatest Hokage so that everyone recognizes him for his true worth. But the road to becoming Hokage is very long and Naruto will face a lot of hardships and will have to face many enemies to achieve his goal!

Several groups worked on the composition of this vinyl, such as:

Asian Kung-Fu Generation, Little By Litte, FLOW, Sambomaster, Stance Punks, Akeboshi, ORANGE RANGE, Raico, Captain Straydum and No Regret Life.

products.name: Naruto POP! Animation Nagato Glow in the Dark Exclusive Figure 10cm N°1574

products.description:

products.name: Naruto Statue 1/6 Team 7 Naruto, Kakashi, Sasuke, Sakura 45cm
products.description:
Naruto Statue of Team 7 Naruto, Kakashi, Sasuke, Sakura, 1/6 scale size approx.45cm. Official product in limited edition of 200 pieces by Cartoon Kingdom.

"With practice, even a failure can become a genius ... "   Rock Lee

A dunce of an orphan and a great prankster, Naruto will do anything stupid to get noticed.

His dream: to become the best Hokage so that he can be recognised by the inhabitants of his village. In fact, the nine-tailed fox demon sealed inside him has aroused the fear and contempt of the other villagers, who, over time, no longer distinguish between Kyûbi and Naruto.

Despite this, Naruto trains hard to become a genin, the highest level of ninja. After failing the genin exam 3 times, he finally managed to receive his headband from Konoha.

He is then included in a team of three ninja apprentices, along with Sakura Haruno and the talented Sasuke Uchiwa, who wants to avenge the people dear to him, by killing his brother Itachi Uchiwa. Soon after, they meet their jōnin (higher class ninja), the one who will be in charge of their training: the mysterious Kakashi Hatake.

This sublime statue represents Team 7 in its entirety.

Inspired by the cover of Volume 5, the ninja spirit of the book is fully reflected in this statue, which is sure to find a place in any collection.

We really wanted to capture the essence of Naruto in this unique opportunity we had to work on this great licence, and it was important for us to have a complete team.

A team that we wanted to be as close-knit as in the early days of the manga, and that went against everything else on the market.

Dimensions: H45xW35xD26cm

products.name: Naruto Card game Ninja
products.description:
Card Game Naruto. Official product by 404 Editions.

Match the cards to create pairs of characters or objects, and quickly get rid of the only Tonitos card to win the round!

Be careful, some of the cards are special! Just like in Spy x Family, Anya's telepathy short-circuits the game, bumps give you strength and Becky lets you revise... Watch out for Damian, always there to get in your way!

Can you avoid the Tonitos? Use your ingenuity to win the most points and be the big winner!

products.name: Naruto Shippuden Collectible Action Figure 1/6 Deidara Standard Version Zen Creations PAF004S
products.description:
Naruto Shippuden Collectible Action Figure of Deidara Standard Version, 1/6 scale. Official product  in limited edition by Zen Creations.

Content :

  • Three (3) interchangeable face sculpts with different expression
  • Two (2) interchangeable hair styles
  • Five (5) pairs of interchangeable hands
  • Straw Hat
  • Eye Scope
  • Six (6) types of Clay Bombs
  • Sunagakure's Base
  • DX Version come with exclusive Deidara’s ride: the Clay Eagle

products.name: Naruto Shippuden Collectible Action Figure 1/6 Deidara Deluxe Version Zen Creations PAF004D
products.description:
Naruto Shippuden Collectible Action Figure of Deidara Deluxe Version, 1/6 scale. Official product  in limited edition by Zen Creations.

Content :

  • Three (3) interchangeable face sculpts with different expression
  • Two (2) interchangeable hair styles
  • Five (5) pairs of interchangeable hands
  • Straw Hat
  • Eye Scope
  • Six (6) types of Clay Bombs
  • Sunagakure's Base
